response: Your top priority is to activate your existing $2,083.96 inventory. With zero ready-to-list or approved assets, you currently have no path to revenue. Focus on getting these assets prepared and listed.

suggested_tasks.title: **Identify Listing Bottleneck**
suggested_tasks.description: Determine why assets aren't moving from inventory to "ready to list" or "approved."

suggested_tasks.title: **Prepare & Submit Assets**
suggested_tasks.description: Dedicate time to get your current inventory through the approval process and listed for sale.
